note: Structural-migration registry for /scaffold-upgrade. One entry per migration that a content-diff cannot express. Append-only: never edit a shipped migration in place — fix a bug with a NEW migration at a later SHA. Each migration is SHA-window-gated (runs once when base < introducedAtSha <= to), idempotent, and journaled. See migrations/_TEMPLATE.md and SCAFFOLDING-GUIDE.md §11.

migrations.title: Add Step-8 reviewer-policy section + {{SECURITY_REVIEW_POLICY}}/{{CODE_QUALITY_REVIEW_POLICY}} to root CLAUDE.md
Install ~/.claude/scripts/team-register.sh (team mode) — spawn prompts now call it
Rename the task tracker MVP_TASKS.md -> IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md (neutral 'implementation plan' name) + update the {{TASK_TRACKER}} placeholder default
Add the '## Parallelization plan' EXAMPLE BLOCK (phase/track DAG + critical path) to IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md (team mode only)
Retrofit [id=] EXAMPLE-BLOCK slugs + bounded living-section rules into the task tracker
Add the posture field to .scaffolding/manifest.json (schema v2)
